additional_rules.name: unpinned-third-party-action
additional_rules.message: Third-party action pinned to mutable tag — pin to full commit SHA for supply chain security
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace @vN tag with @<full-sha> and add a version comment (e.g., # v4.1.7)

additional_rules.name: missing-permissions-block
additional_rules.message: Workflow may be missing explicit permissions block — default GITHUB_TOKEN permissions are overly broad
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add a top-level 'permissions:' block with minimum required permissions (start with contents: read)

additional_rules.name: secrets-in-run-expression
additional_rules.message: Secret used in expression context — ensure it is not interpolated directly in run: steps (expression injection risk)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Pass secrets via env: block and reference as $SECRET_NAME in run: steps instead of inline ${{ secrets.* }}

additional_rules.name: pull-request-target-with-checkout
additional_rules.message: pull_request_target event detected — verify workflow does NOT checkout PR head code (security risk: attacker-controlled code with secret access)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use pull_request event for building PR code, or ensure checkout defaults to base branch. For secret access, use workflow_run pattern.
